description: On the Baggage page, dragging a baggage option (e.g. Carry-on) into the 'Your baggage' drop zone does not add the item; the drop zone stays empty or shows 'Drag baggage options here'.
expectedOutcome: After dragging an option into the drop zone, that option appears in the 'Your baggage' list and can be removed or the user can continue to review.
hint: The drop handler is memoized with useCallback but its dependency array does not include the values it reads from the component.
symptom: Dragging a baggage option into the drop zone does not add it to the list.
solution: Add draggedItem and selectedItems to the useCallback dependency array for handleDrop so the callback always sees current state instead of a stale closure.
